label: reconstruction_observables_v1_orca_fusion_m10
purpose: replay only the frozen held-out ORCA-Fusion morphology fits and evaluate physical low-order density observables on one fixed object-plane support

integration_support.half_widths_source: source benchmark study_config.json density_basis.support_half_width_y_um and support_half_width_z_um

replay_verification.interpretation: every replayed seed, candidate, legacy map metric and integer rank diagnostic must agree with the sealed source row before observable results are written

figure.finite_ensemble_display: median with observed minimum-to-maximum range; not a confidence interval

claims_boundary.absolute_density_status: truth and inverse use the same stated synthetic response coefficient
claims_boundary.angle_status: principal-axis angle is an alignment diagnostic and is omitted below the declared fractional-anisotropy threshold
claims_boundary.uncertainty_status: two fixed noise realizations per morphology form a finite development ensemble, not publication-level coverage evidence
